title: Internal Linking Map
description: Resolves [LINK:...] placeholders from Claude-generated articles to actual site URLs and anchor text.

article_slug.description: Slug of the article this linking map belongs to.

article_id.description: Sanity document ID of the article (populated after publish).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the map was generated.

site_url.description: Client site base URL (from CLIENT_SITE_URL env var).

total_links.description: Total number of link entries in this map.

resolved_count.description: Number of links that have been human-verified and resolved.

links.description: All internal link entries for this article.

placeholder.description: The original [LINK:...] marker as it appears in the article HTML.

suggested_url.description: Best-guess URL based on site architecture. Requires human verification.

anchor_text.description: Descriptive anchor text — never 'click here' or 'learn more'.

link_type.description: Classification of link target for internal linking strategy.

resolved.description: True once a human has verified the URL is correct and live.

resolved_url.description: Final, human-verified URL. Null until resolved.

resolved_at.description: Timestamp when this link was resolved.

notes.description: Optional editor notes about this link placement.
